caption: Figure 3: The influence of context length on the performance of RAG. The evaluations are conducted on En.QA and EN.MC datasets of ∞Bench.
content: Two-panel line chart figure showing the influence of context length (x-axis, in K) on RAG performance. Left panel (a) EN.QA plots F1 score for Llama3.1-8B (blue circles) and Llama3.1-70B (orange triangles) across context lengths from about 4K to 96K; 8B peaks around 16K then declines, while 70B rises to the mid/high 40s and stays relatively high before tapering slightly. Right panel (b) EN.MC plots Accuracy for the same two models over similar context lengths; 8B peaks around 16K then declines, while 70B peaks around 24K–48K and then slowly decreases.

subplots.label: a
subplots.content: EN.QA line chart of F1 score versus context length for Llama3.1-8B and Llama3.1-70B.

subplots.label: b
subplots.content: EN.MC line chart of Accuracy versus context length for Llama3.1-8B and Llama3.1-70B.
